_meta.title: API Endpoint Map — JumpCloud, Google Workspace (Admin SDK), Sophos Central
_meta.structure_note: Per request: each endpoint has queries (HTTP method + path), options (parameters / body / scopes), example (sample curl), purpose (what it does).

field_definitions.options: Request options: parameters (name, in[path/query/header/body], type, required, description), plus auth scopes (Google) / consumes-produces (JumpCloud) where available
field_definitions.example: A ready-to-adapt curl example with auth headers and required params templated as {placeholders}
field_definitions.purpose: Short description of what the endpoint does (from the official spec/guide)
field_definitions.confidence: Only on Sophos entries: HIGH = verbatim from authoritative source; MEDIUM = exists & cross-referenced but exact path/params partly inferred

sources.JumpCloud: Official OpenAPI 2.0 specs from TheJumpCloud/jcapi-powershell repo (SwaggerSpecs/JumpCloud.SDK.{V1,V2,DirectoryInsights}.json) — the same Swagger specs that power docs.jumpcloud.com. Confidence: HIGH.
sources.Google Workspace: Official Google API Discovery documents (admin directory_v1, reports_v1, datatransfer_v1; reseller v1) mirrored in googleapis/google-api-go-client. Contact Delegation (3 methods) from the official reference-overview listing. Confidence: HIGH.
sources.Sophos: developer.sophos.com is a JS SPA whose live spec download is auth-gated; could not be fetched verbatim. Endpoint API base from third-party OpenAPI mirror (MEDIUM) + official guides; SIEM from Sophos's own GitHub integration code (HIGH); Account Health Check primary route HIGH, score routes MEDIUM. See per-group 'provenance'.

_meta.filtered_for: Admin / security / inventory data feeding the tracking table (read-only GET endpoints). Generated by filtering api_endpoint_map.json.
